svg.title: AI Coach SDLC Representation
svg.desc: An SDLC style representation of the AI Coach module in the Talent IQ project.
svg.text: Software development life cycle view of the AI coach and interview subsystem
Need an authenticated AI assistant that can teach coding concepts, simulate interviews, accept voice input, and provide structured feedback.
Design dual interaction modes, protected routes, prompt separation, streaming API flow, transcript panel, voice toggles, and optional avatar integration.
React page logic, voice hook, streaming fetch client, Express AI routes, controller functions, provider abstraction, local fallback logic, and configuration-based avatar support.
Verify protected access, prompt switching, streamed transcript rendering, microphone states, spoken output, fallback behavior, and interview-format consistency.
Add analytics, stored transcripts, rubric scoring, company-specific interview sets, and benchmark-based quality evaluation.
